# Packet: Minimal Packet Coverage

- ID: minimal-packet-01
- Feature: minimal-feature
- Version: mvp

## Objective

Provide a single packet markdown file for the minimal fixture.

## Scope included

- Keep one prompt-bearing packet in the smallest source.

## Scope excluded

- Any broader feature set.

## Done criteria

- /api/prompt/minimal-packet-01 returns a packet prompt.

## Suggested follow-up prompt

Suggested follow-up prompt: `Use $spec-driven-docs to sync docs after implementing minimal-packet-01.`
